name: Vegetable Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Broccoli, frozen/thawed or Zucchini -- fresh/frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 13 x 9-inch pan with cooking spray.
2. Mix white sauce according to package directions.
3. Add onions, mushrooms, broccoli, pepper, and garlic powder to the white sauce.
4. Layer ingredients as follows: 1 cup Spaghetti sauce/Ragu, low-fat, 3 noodles, 1/3 of broccoli mixture/zucchini, 1/3 of mozzarella, 1/3 of Parmesan.
5. Repeat steps 2-4 twice for three complete layers.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
7. Let stand for 15 minutes before cutting.
